- What was broken?
- Root cause:

## Fix

- What changed?
- Why this fix is safe:

## Validation

- [ ] Repro before fix
- [ ] Repro no longer fails
- [ ] Added/updated regression tests
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run lint:all:fix:quiet` (or explain why not run)
